title: Mini Acrylic Paint Set, 10pcs 8Colors Acrylic Paint Strips for Kids Adults Art & Craft Painting,Container Storage Paints Pots for Birthday Halloween Party School Home Classroom Painting Supplies Gifts
features: 🎨🎨Rich Colors -- 80pcs 3ml mini acrylic paints set, made of high quality acrylic material, compact size, easy to store, easy to carry when you go out, adults and children can use it safely. There are 8 colors: black, white, green, blue, yellow, red, pink and purple. Mix easily to create unique wall art, DIY works and more.

🌳🌳Easy Storage & Organization -- The acrylic paint storage containers are equipped with snap-on lids, which ensure a good seal as long as you open and close them carefully each time you use them, and they can be cut freely, making them more convenient to use without worrying about pigment leakage.

✨✨Multipurpose Paint Set -- This acrylic paint is suitable for a wide range of arts and crafts projects, classroom needs and party supplies. Great for paper or canvas painting, wood, shell and rock painting, ceramics, fabrics, and many other arts and crafts projects.

💐💐Fun Painting Time -- Share these painting arts and crafts containers with your kids, family, neighbors or close friends and have a great weekend together. Can also be used for school, home, painting classes, art festivals, birthday parties, painting parties and other occasions.
🛒🛒Cleaning method: If the acrylic paint gets on the fabric clothes, wash it as soon as possible before drying, after drying it can't be washed.
